remarks: A rare renovation opportunity offering accessible entry into one of Stamford's most competitive housing markets. River Haven is an owner-centric co-op residence, uniquely positioned in a residential neighborhood between Scalzi and Mill River Park adjacent, alongside Hart Magnet and Cloonan public schools with Ridgeway Shopping Center just moments away and downtown Stamford a short, pleasant stroll. This is an open 2 BR, 1 BTH end unit with abundant natural light and presents a full scale renovation opportunity -- ideal to customize a home to one's individual standard and recreate this 900 sq ft abode into a very special place. The flexible layout features a well proportioned living room, a future dream kitchen with a large dining area, two surprisingly large freshly painted bedrooms and the potential to create a modern, personalized interior. The possibilities are endless. Enjoy the convenience of a prime, amenity rich location close to restaurants, entertainment, shops, schools, parks, and public transportation. This is an estate sale offered in as is condition, no disclosures given, owner occupancy only, no investors. Board requires a maximum 34 debt to income ratio. Taxes incl. in HOA.
